programs.title: Dance Moms
programs.desc: (PG) After a season full of fights, losses, and heartbreak, Abby and the moms gather to discuss the most memorable moments of the past year.

programs.title: Dance Moms
programs.desc: (PG) Their moms have had the floor to air their feuds, frustrations and alliances; now, for the first time ever, it’s the girls’ turn to dish the dirt.

programs.title: Dance Moms
programs.sub_title: The Battle of Maddie vs. Chloe
programs.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.
